name: Bouncing Bonny
description: A Dahl Bouncing Betty variant that ricochets and scatters child grenades across a wide area, making it excellent for blanketing clustered enemies. The main grenade's bullet spray will not hit allies, but the child explosions can still catch you if you throw it too close.
notes:
Its closest Seraph counterpart is Crossfire. With matching parts, Bouncing Bonny usually shows slightly higher damage and a shorter listed fuse, but it releases its child grenades a little more slowly.

The red text nods to the old ballad The Twa Sisters. It has also been available from certain SHiFT code rewards.

special.description: Launches a child grenade in a random direction every 2.5 seconds. It boosts damage and blast radius, shortens fuse time, and adds extra child grenades on each bounce.
special.title: Your sister is such a bitch.
